name: role reference 'my dentist' resolves via the relationship fact
description: docs/ANALYSIS.md 'Role references [decided: via relationship facts]': 'my dentist'/'my boss' resolve through the relationship fact (dentist_of, employer) valid at the note's time -- never static aliases. Note 1 establishes Dr. Okafor as my dentist; note 2 says 'saw my dentist'. The role mention MUST resolve to Dr. Okafor, so the new appointment fact attaches to Dr. Okafor and NO separate 'my dentist' entity is created. XFAIL: entities.resolve_entity only does layer-1 exact alias/canonical match; role-reference-via-relationship-fact resolution is unimplemented, so 'my dentist' mints a new provisional entity instead of resolving to Dr. Okafor. Failing line: "expected NO fact matching {'entity': 'my dentist'...}, found 1" / "expected entity 'my dentist' [absent] ... found".
xfail: Role-reference resolution via relationship facts is unimplemented (entities.resolve_entity is exact-alias-only); 'my dentist' mints a distinct provisional entity rather than resolving through the dentist relationship fact valid at the note's time (docs/ANALYSIS.md 'Role references').

steps.body: Dr. Okafor is my dentist now — switched practices.
Saw my dentist today; she recommended a night guard.

facts.statement: My dentist recommended a night guard.
